projectDescription: A zero-config Python library and CLI that records every function call, exception, SQL query, and HTTP request in your application so you can replay and diagnose crashes from your terminal.
keyFeatures: Zero-config recording: two lines of Python captures function calls, exceptions, SQL, HTTP, and logs
Interactive terminal replay: step through any crash event-by-event with slomo replay
Automatic issue deduplication: crashes are fingerprinted and grouped so the same bug increments one counter
Heuristic root-cause diagnosis via slomo doctor: identifies null references, bad variables, and likely fix
Full-text search across all recorded events with field filters
Auto-tracing via sys.monitoring (PEP 669): traces project code with near-zero overhead
Privacy-first redaction: secrets, tokens, and keys are scrubbed at capture time before hitting disk
Crash-safe append-only JSONL storage with no external dependencies
publicApiSurface: slomo.enable(root, labels, hooks) — start recording the current process
slomo.disable() — stop recording and finalize the session
slomo.track — decorator for explicit function span recording (sync, async, generators)
slomo.snapshot(label, **variables) — record an explicit variable snapshot
slomo.event(name, severity, **payload) — record a custom event
slomo.install_hooks() — re-run hook installation after late imports
slomo.flush() — block until all buffered events are flushed to disk
slomo init — scaffold .slomo/ with commented config
slomo sessions / slomo session show|inspect|delete ID
slomo issues / slomo issue show|occurrences|timeline|resolve|reopen|explain ID
slomo doctor ISSUE — heuristic root-cause diagnosis
slomo replay ISSUE|SESSION — interactive step-through TUI
slomo timeline [REF] [--follow] [--errors]
slomo search QUERY [field=value ...]
slomo vars / slomo http / slomo sql [REF]
slomo stats [--rebuild-index]
slomo export json|markdown|csv|html
slomo prune [--keep N]
.slomo/config.toml — recording, storage, redaction, hooks configuration
SLOMO_ENABLED, SLOMO_AUTOTRACE, SLOMO_HOOK_HTTP, SLOMO_HOOK_SQL, SLOMO_HOOK_LOGGING, SLOMO_SNAPSHOTS environment variables
